title: The Shadow of the Spark: Why Kerala’s Fireworks Regulations are Backfiring
description: The catastrophic blast in Thrissur in April 2026 was not merely an industrial accident; it was a predictable outcome of a regulatory philosophy that prioritizes prohibition over partnership. As the smoke cleared, the familiar cycle of “Stop Memos,” police raids, […] The post The Shadow of the Spark: Why Kerala’s Fireworks Regulations are Backfiring appeared first on Centre for Public Policy Research (CPPR).
